Lesser Succor  

Description

1: Decrease Mana by 300
2: Evacuate to -300,-1,-1 in same facing NW

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 150 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 10.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any AE Range: 100
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Group v2
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso creates a mystic portal.
Effect Fades: The portal shimmers and fades.

Game Description

Opens a mystical portal that transports your group to a relatively safe location in the current zone. The chaotic nature of the portal drains mana from anyone who passes through it.

Items with this effect

  • Crucible of Escape
  • Spell: Lesser Succor

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Lesser Succor
ClassLevel
DRU18
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (20)
  • Sold By (6)
  • Screenshots

one more question
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2004 at 11:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802591161
3 posts
So it only clears agaro after you zone, not once you start casting, correct?

-bamfa
49 dru wood elf
▲ Page top
Differences in Lesser/Normal Succor
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 12:52 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591751437183
View User Forum
Scholar
151 posts
There are 4 difference between Lesser Succor (18) and the regular Succor (57). Succor:

1) Requires less mana than Lesser Succor
2) Casts just a bit faster
3) Drains less mana from the members of the group
4) Is less likely to leave behind any members of the group (very uncommon even with Lesser, but it DOES happen occasionally)
▲ Page top
casting on group
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2002 at 8:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781676662
1 post
how do you cast this on group
▲ Page top
RE: casting on group
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 12:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751437183
View User Forum
Scholar
151 posts
The spell automatically targets you and any members of your own group who are in range of it. I do not think that the /tgb option would work to cast the Succor/evac spells on another group-- if it did, you'd port out that group and yourself, leaving the rest of your own group stranded... good way to **** of a whole group at once.
▲ Page top

# Nov 16 2003 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent

I do not know if Succor has a chance of leaving someone behind.
▲ Page top
Aggro
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2002 at 5:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774416644
View User Forum
2 posts
Just a little common sense here:

When you cast Lesser Succor you zone,
when you zone your aggro clears. It takes you out of the zone which means the monster doesnt know you are there anymore, when you are back in you have to **** it off all over agian before it will attack you.
▲ Page top
Lesser Succor
QuoteReply
# May 27 2002 at 6:31 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591756918651
99 posts
The level 18 druid spell, Lesser Succor, may be purchased from the druid vendor in ShadowHaven. I don't know the difference between Succor and Lesser Succor, other than Lesser Succor taking 10.5 seconds to case (versus 9) and using 150self/300other (versus 100/200).

Here are some of the place it will take you and your group.

Ak'Anon - at zone to Steamfont (47, -35)
Arena - at zone (-11, -817)
Blackburrow - at zone to Qeynos Hills (-159, 39)
Burning Woods - near Dreadlands zone (-4942, -821)
Butcherblock - a bit southeast of Kaladim (2550, -700)
Chardok - right by exit zone (119, 859)
City of Mist - near zone to Emerald Jungle (28, -734)
Cobalt Scar - in the middle otter village (-399, -1185)
Crushbone - at zone (-644, 158)
Dagnor's Cauldron - in gorge to Butcherblock (2815, 320)
Dawnshroud Peaks - near Sanctus Seru zone (0, 2085)
Dreadlands - just south of wizard spires (2806, 9565)
East Commons - near West Commons zone (8, 4947)
East Freeport - middle of boat dock (-14, -950)
East Karana - on bridge to North Karana (10, 900)
Eastern Wastes - in southeast region (-5049, -4296)
Emerald Jungle - near Field of Bone zone (-1223, 4648)
Erudin - near docks (0,0)
Erudin Palace - at zone-in, just above zone-out (712, 808)
Erud's Crossing - on cat island near dock (-1767, 795)
Everfrost - just south of tunnel to Halas (3139, 629)
Feerrott - just south of Oggok zone (1051, 905)
Field of Bone - middle of zone (-1684, 1617)
Firiona Vie - just outside city (-2329, 1440)
Frontier Mountains - by Lake of Ill Omen zone (-633, -4262)
Gorge of King Xorbb - in gorge toward Eask Karana (-512, -31)
Greater Faydark - near newbie lift (-20, 10)
Halas - at gates to town (0, 0)
Highhold Pass - south of East Karana zone (164, 74)
High Keep - near zone (-16, 88)
Hole - on land nearest Paineel zone (640, -1050)
Iceclad Ocean - at end of dock away from NPC (5330, 340)
Innothule Swamp - just north of Grogg (-2192, -588)
Kael - at Eastern Wastes zone (-8, -655)
Kedge Keep - at zone to Dagnor's Cauldron (100, 14)
Kithicor Woods - near Rivervale zone (1889, 3828)
Lake of Ill Omen - near West Cabilis zone (5747, -5383)
Lake Rathetear - near South Karana zone (4183, 1213)
Lavastorm - near zone to Nektulos Forest (-1833, -154)
Lesser Faydark - near shadowmen camp (-108, -1920)
Lower Guk - at dead side zone to Upper Guk (1197, -217)
Mistmoore - at zone to Lesser Faydark (-330, 120)
Misty Thicket - just north of gate in wall, on Runnyeye side (0, 0)
Mons Letalis - near Mons Seru zone (-1249, -623)
Najena - near zone to Lavastorm (-76, 858)
Nektulos Forest - on south bank of river west of bridge - (-1201, -259)
Netherbian Lair - near Nexus zone (1787, 14)
Northern Ro - near Freeport (3538, 299)
North Freeport - near the easternmost zone to East Freeport (-296, 211)
North Kaladim - by tunnel to South Kaladim (494, 300)
North Karana - crossroads northeast of gypsy camp (-284, -382)
North Qeynos - in newbie area between gate and fake wall (428, -74)
Oasis - northwest corner of lake (450, 904)
Ocean of Tears - dock on Sister Island (390, -9200)
Overthere - by Warslik's Woods (-241, -4263)
Paineel - near Toxxulia zone (800, 200)
Permafrost - near zone to Everfrost (-121, 61)
Plane of Growth - at zone-in (-2522, 3016)
Qeynos Catacombs - near Bait Masterson's haunt (860, 80)
Rathe Mountains - a bit east of Lake Rathetear zone (3825, 1831)
Rivervale - at zone to Misty Thicket (0, 0)
Runnyeye - in tunnel to Misty Thicket (90, 201)
Skyfire - near Overthere zone (-1140, -4286)
Sanctus Seru - near Dawnshroud Peaks (1166, -232)
Sebilis - at zone-in (250, 0)
ShadowHaven - near Paludel Caverns (-982, 190)
Siren's Grotto - near Western Wastes zone, by wandering Molktor (196, -33)
Skyshrine - at Wakening Lands zone (-210, -730)
SolA (Solusek's Eye) - near zone to Lavastorm (-476, -486)
SolB (Nagafen's Lair) - near zone to Lavastorm (424, -263)
South Kaladim - near Butcherblock zone (-18, -2)
South Karana - near bridge to North Karana (2348, 1294)
South Qeynos - on dock by Mermaid's Lure (10, 0)
South Ro - top of wizard platform (-1044, -124)
Steamfont Mountains - near windmills (160, -273)
Surefall Glade - a bit east of the tunnel to Qeynos Hills (0,0)
Swamp of No Hope - amidst outbuildings by East Cabilis (2761, 2945)
Trakanon's Teeth - by Emerald Jungle zone (3868, 1486)
Toxxulia Forest - near Erudin zone (2295, 203)
Unrest - in tunnel to Dagnor's Cauldron zone (-38, 52)
Upper Guk - at zone to Innothule Swamp (-36, 7)
Velktor's Labyrinth - at zone (581, -65)
Wakening Lands - at Kael zone (-673, -5000)
Warrens - near Paineel zone (748, -930)
West Commons - near East Commons zone (214, -1334)
West Freeport - in newbie area a bit north of the gate (335, 180)
West Karana - near Qeynos Hills zone (15, -531)
Western Wastes - a little northwest of tunnel to Siren's Grotto (-4099, -3499)

in Katta Castellum it's bring u to Tenebrous Mountains ZI (Very usefull as long katta is a little maze when u don't know this zone)and,

in Tenebrous Mountain it's bring u to Katta Castellum ZI

▲ Page top
RE: Lesser Succor
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 10:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758933365
16 posts
Quick trip to Shar Vahl: Zone into Shadowhaven from bazaar or nexus, evac to Paludal Caverns zone (-3721, -241) , take 2 steps south into Paludal, evac to Shadeweaver's zone (2122, -3570) , take 2 steps east into Shadeweavers, evac to Shar Vahl zone.

Swamp of No Hope: By Cabilis zone. You're close to the iksar guards, but they don't roam much. You can still invis and walk right by them.

Websites with evac locations:
* EQDruids,
http://www.eqdruids.com/reference/spells_egress.htm
* EverQuesting with Glory,
http://www.glorysite.com/eq/egress.html
* Graffe's Wizard Compilation,
http://www.graffe.com/library/abscond.htm


Edited, Thu Sep 5 16:42:36 2002

▲ Page top
Unexpected GOOD thing
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2002 at 10:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361890450
44 posts
One of my alts is a 40 druid. I went online last night and got the new "Lesser Succor" spell for druids. It is a cool spell that does a little
more than I originally thought it would. When cast, what we knew (by reading the message boards) was it is lvl 18, 10 second casting time, costs 150 mana for the caster, and takes 300 from all of the casters in the party, and drops you on the 'safe spot' in whatever zone you cast it in. What we didn't know...but I tested hard last night.....it clears agro/hate. (not just moves you to another point in the zone, like the 57 or 58 druid spell Succor, or the CoH of a wizzy.)

I tested this in 5 different zones...none of them very high lvl. Qeynos hills, West Karana, West Commons, East Commons, and NRO. Now....First I
would zone into these areas, and cast the lesser succor spell, and find out where the 'safe spot' in the zone is. Then I logged onto my second computer with my second account, and got my 24 mage on, and agro'd stuff (hand to hand) and pulled it to near that safe spot. I would cast the succor spell, and get the LOADING, PLEASE WAIT message, and show up a few feet from the
mob I had pulled. Hate/agro cleared....<woot!>

I don't know what this will do in "higher" level zones. But for lower lvl folks, this is nice.

Leenyn
Tarew Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Unexpected GOOD thing
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 12:42 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751437183
View User Forum
Scholar
151 posts
Like all the "evac" type spells, this spell actually zones your party out of the zone, then zones them back in at the landing spot. Regardless of the zone you use it in, if you can get off a Succor/Evac, your aggro will be cleared.
▲ Page top
